display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（挨打猫 v1.1・小小维修兔 v1.29）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: Feedback Cat delivery-proof channel; stores feedback in current chat metadata with fallback, registers a dedicated hidden prompt immediately on save, refreshes it in the generation interceptor, adds source visual fingerprints for preset feedback, and preserves the 0.33.36 base prompt when no feedback is active.
